A hidden zippered pocket on the inside of the flap stores particularly valuable personal items.

items.name_en: Top-tier Original M13257✨ Supports NXP Chip Dynamic Chip❤️ This Speedy Soft 30 handbag is crafted from soft coated canvas, depicting a full Monogram pattern in vibrant rainbow tones, highlighting the dynamic style of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami re-edition series. Constructed of calfskin for the Toron handle and detachable shoulder strap, metal corners recall classic luggage elements, while the bow-shaped key pouch and lock add a brand touch.

items.name_en: Exclusive Real Shot m12019
items.name_cn:
Exclusive Real Shot m12019
Inspired by the 1960s Knick-Knack handbag, this Lockit BB handbag offers flexible carrying options. The Monogram coated canvas features a curved top edge and oval trim, echoing classic elements of the original design. The padlock closure pays homage to the brand's long heritage.
Size: 15 x 19 x 7 cm

specs.rawTitle:
Exclusive Real Shot m12019
Inspired by the 1960s Knick-Knack handbag, this Lockit BB handbag offers flexible carrying options. The Monogram coated canvas features a curved top edge and oval trim, echoing classic elements of the original design. The padlock closure pays homage to the brand's long heritage.
Size: 15 x 19 x 7 cm

items.name_en: Exclusive photo M11623 This Pochette Accessoire XL handbag is presented in Monogram Dust canvas, featuring a Monogram pattern weathered by time, injecting a bold spirit into the classic silhouette from 1990. The spacious main zip compartment features a patch pocket, along with a non-functional tassel nameplate and removable Marque L.Vuitton Déposée decoration. Monogram Dust coated canvas - aged calfskin trim - fabric lining - metal hardware - main zip compartment - interior patch pocket - non-functional removable tassel nameplate - removable round decoration - shoulder strap: removable, adjustable - dimensions: 28x16.5x9CM

items.name_en: Exclusive photo m11303 Monogram/Pink m11672 Monogram/Yellow
items.name_cn:
Exclusive photo m11303 Monogram/Pink m11672 Monogram/Yellow
Bloom Pouch Jh handbag combines classic Monogram canvas with soft leather on the sides, interpreting the inspiration of Monogram flowers with a gentle design. The compact structure can hold daily essentials like a short wallet, phone, keys, and lipstick, and the detachable chain allows for multiple carrying styles. Dimensions: 22.5 x 13 x 13 cm

items.name_en: Crystal Silver Large Size OHANEL Vintage Have you seen this bag? Who doesn't love Black Silver!! 🍋🍋 The lazy style Black Silver hobo hits my aesthetic perfectly! Silver rod on the side, double C pendant with zipper, embossed logo, I love every detail ahhh! Casual yet high-end when worn. Can be carried by hand, underarm, or clutch. The leather is soft and has a great texture, full of lazy vibes!! I suggest everyone should own it! Love brain reached the peak, I can't control the silver rod hobo glossy large shoulder crossbody bag. Low-key, lazy, and casual. This series is too popular. Shoulder, underarm, and crossbody bag styles. Beauty and practicality combined. It's really too practical for going out!

items.name_en: Exclusive Real Photos M24996 Screen Print (Surfing) This Christopher Medium Backpack uses Monogram Surfin' canvas inspired by Pharrell Williams, interpreting the inspiration of a rucksack. Surfboards and floral elements construct an intricate overlapping pattern, highlighting a retro atmosphere with vibrant tones. The close-fitting silhouette includes ample space, with compartments and side pockets. Dimensions: 38x44x12.5cm

The close-fitting silhouette includes ample space, with compartments and side pockets. Dimensions: 38x44x12.5cm

items.name_en: Mini Puzzle geometric bag 👄L New model puzzle mini👉Mini No.10173, the most sought-after bag of 2019 ✔️ Same style as Mengwei Qiwei He Sui... Loewe latest model uses imported calfskin, German imported Saffiano thread, YKK custom hardware. Don't let it be mini, it's super spacious, can hold plus size lipstick and powder with no pressure. Suitable for petite cute girls, also suitable for tall fairies. Size: 18×12.5×8cm [Comes with counter packaging]
